# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security issue in smbgen, please report it responsibly.

Preferred reporting options:

- Open a private GitHub Security Advisory for this repository
- Open a private issue and clearly mark it as a security report

Do not disclose vulnerabilities publicly until they have been addressed.

## Supported Versions

This project is currently released under the MIT License and is accepting security reports for the latest stable release.

## Response

Maintainains will respond to security reports as quickly as possible and provide updates through the chosen report channel.

## Disclosure

If you want to publicly disclose a fixed vulnerability, please coordinate with the maintainers first.
